title: oenothera domingensis
intro: Oenothera domingensis is a species of evening primrose, a flowering plant native to the island of Hispaniola, which is shared by Haiti and the Dominican Republic. The plant is rich in omega-6 fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), and has been used to support various health benefits due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Oenothera domingensis include alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as reducing inflammation and improving skin health. Herbal preparations of Oenothera domingensis can be found in capsule or oil form, often used to support overall well-being and relieve symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances.
